data.title: FTC Requires 365 Retail Markets to Divest Micromarket Kiosk Business to Clear Acquisition of Cantaloupe
data.description:
By Elias Schisgall

The Federal Trade Commission will require 365 Retail Markets to divest Cantaloupe's Three Square Market micromarket kiosk business as a condition of its acquisition of Cantaloupe.

The agency said its proposed consent order would settle its charges that 365 Retail's acquisition of Cantaloupe in a $848 million deal would eliminate competition in the micromarket kiosk market, possibly driving up prices and reducing quality.

The order would require 365 Retail to divest Three Square Market to Seaga Manufacturing, which the agency said would make Seaga a tech-enabled, vertically integrated competitor in the micromarket kiosk market.

The order also would appoint a monitor to oversee 365 Retail's compliance with its terms, and bar the company from acquiring direct or indirect interest in any other company involving micromarket kiosks for 10 years without advance notice to the FTC.

"Today's FTC action seeks to ensure that consumers don't face higher food prices because of this acquisition," FTC Bureau of Competition Director Daniel Guarnera said. "The divestiture of Cantaloupe's Three Square Market business will preserve competition in the micromarket kiosk industry, directly benefitting American workers that depend on these kiosks for their meals."

Cantaloupe said it expects the merger will occur on or around May 8 in a Friday filing with the Securities and Exchange Commission.

Write to Elias Schisgall at elias.schisgall@wsj.com

data.title: Vincent LoPriore Discloses Investment at Hepion Pharmaceuticals with 21.46% Stake
data.description:
Vincent LoPriore disclosed a 21.46% stake in Hepion Pharmaceuticals, Inc. through his direct holdings and affiliated entities. The Schedule 13D was filed on May 1, 2026. The position combines shares held by Gravitas Capital LP and the Invictus Capital Advisors Pension Plan, which LoPriore controls.

Investor Intent

LoPriore holds Hepion shares "for investment purposes" and "may make further acquisitions of the Common Stock from time to time." He does not outline any plans to change control, push for board changes, or pursue strategic transactions at this time. The filing describes a straightforward investment stance, while leaving room for additional buying if conditions warrant. Investors may read this as a sizable insider-aligned position without an announced agenda.

Investor's Background

Vincent LoPriore serves as Executive Chairman of Hepion Pharmaceuticals, Inc. and is a U.S. citizen. He is the Managing Member of Gravitas Capital LP and the trustee and beneficiary of the Invictus Capital Advisors Pension Plan. He has the authority to vote and dispose of the shares held by Gravitas Capital LP and the pension plan.

Original SEC Filing: Hepion Pharmaceuticals, Inc. [ HEPA ] - SCHEDULE 13D - May. 01, 2026

Disclaimer
This is an AI-powered summary. It may contain inaccuracies. Consider verifying important information with the source. Please note this summary is solely based on documents filed with the SEC.

data.title: SMMT Stock Plunges On Wider Q1 Loss, Lung Cancer Clinical Trial Update
data.description:
Key points:
  • Summit on Thursday reported a first-quarter 2026 net loss of $189.4 million, more than triple the $62.9 million loss a year earlier.
  • Piper Sandler lowered its price target on Summit to $16 from $17 and maintained a ‘Neutral’ rating on the shares.
  • The company’s interim update from its HARMONi-3 trial disappointed investors. Final data from the cohort remain on track for the second half of 2026.

Shares of Summit Therapeutics Inc. (SMMT) closed 25% lower on Friday after the company reported a wider loss for the first quarter and an interim analysis update from its HARMONi-3 trial, prompting Piper Sandler to lower its price target on the stock.

Piper Sandler lowered its price target on Summit to $16 from $17 and maintained a ‘Neutral’ rating on the shares.

Summit’s Q1 Earnings

Summit on Thursday reported a first-quarter 2026 net loss of $189.4 million, more than triple the $62.9 million loss a year earlier, as the company ramps up spending on its lead asset ivonescimab in the treatment of non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC).

The company is studying Ivonescimab combined with chemotherapy in patients with first-line metastatic NSCLC in its HARMONi-3 trial, with two distinct cohorts to be analyzed separately for squamous tumors and non-squamous tumors.

In squamous tumors, an independent Data Monitoring Committee completed a pre-specified interim progression-free survival analysis in Q2 2026 and recommended that the study continue as planned with no safety concerns, the company said. However, it did not hit the high statistical bar for early success/stop. Final data from the cohort remain on track for the second half of 2026.

In the non-squamous tumors cohort, enrollment is expected to be completed by the end of Q2 2026, and data readout is targeted for the first half of 2027.

According to Piper Sandler, investors are now questioning whether the impressive effect size seen in Akeso's HARMONi-6 can be replicated in Summit's global HARMONi-3.

HARMONi-6 is a trial conducted in China and sponsored by Akeso, which evaluates ivonescimab in combination with platinum-based chemotherapy compared with the drug tislelizumab and platinum-based chemotherapy in non-small cell lung cancer.

How Did Retail Traders React?

On Stocktwits, retail sentiment around SMMT stock rose from ‘bearish’ to ‘bullish’ territory over the past 24 hours, while message volume rose from ‘low’ to ‘high’ levels.

A Stocktwits user dismissed the selloff as an overreaction.

https://www.stocktwits.com/northern18738901/message/652058452

Another echoed the sentiment, expressing optimism for the stock to rally back up over $18 in two weeks.

https://www.stocktwits.com/BobBijawklah/message/652053579

SMMT stock has fallen 35% over the past 12 months.

data.title: Shares of eBay Rise on Report of GameStop Deal Interest — WSJ
data.description:
By WSJ Staff

Shares of eBay rose about 10% in afterhours trading Friday after The Wall Street Journal reported that GameStop has been quietly building a stake in the company's shares ahead of a potential offer. GameStop could submit an offer for eBay as soon as later this month, people familiar with the matter told the Journal. GameStop, which has a market value of around $12 billion, would be taking a big bite to digest eBay, whose market value was recently about $46 billion.

This item is part of a Wall Street Journal live coverage event. The full stream can be found by searching P/WSJL (WSJ Live Coverage).

data.title: NexMetals Mining to Hold Virtual AGM May 27; Seeks Omnibus Plan, Director Elections
data.description:
NexMetals Mining announced virtual annual meeting on May 27, 2026 and circulated proxy materials including election of eight directors and Omnibus Plan approval.

Key Highlights:

  • Issued Notice of AGM, management information circular, form of proxy and financial statement request via SEDAR+ on April 30, 2026.
  • Virtual AGM set for May 27, 2026 at 9:00 a.m. Vancouver time; record date April 22, 2026; 35,648,164 common shares outstanding.
  • Shareholders to vote on election of eight directors, appointment of MNP LLP as auditor, and approval of the Omnibus equity incentive plan.
  • Board unanimously recommends shareholders vote FOR director elections, auditor appointment and Omnibus Plan resolution.
  • Disclosed executive compensation framework, NEO list, outstanding awards and recent executive terminations and consulting arrangements (e.g., Lekstrom, Rawlins).

Original SEC Filing: NexMetals Mining Corp. [ NEXM ] - 8-K - May. 01, 2026

data.title: Helio Reaches $879,163 Debt Settlement With Sean Wolf, Sets Leak-Out Stock Sales
data.description:
Helio entered a settlement agreement with Sean Wolf on April 27, 2026 to resolve $879,163 outstanding under two 9.75% promissory notes from October 2024. The amount will be repaid from net proceeds of Wolf’s sales of Helio common stock under leak-out limits and any direct company payments. Wolf may sell up to the greater of 4,000 shares (when daily volume is at least 20,000 shares) or 12% of daily volume, with a block cap of 2,000 shares; the cap rises to 25% upon an exchange uplisting or on July 5, 2026. Helio will facilitate legend removal and broker processing to enable sales, and proceeds will reduce the balance until satisfied.

Agreement details:

  • Agreement type: Debt settlement agreement resolving two promissory notes with leak-out stock sale terms
  • Counterparty: Sean Wolf
  • Signed / Effective: Apr 27 2026 / same
  • Duration / Termination: Until Settlement Amount is repaid
  • Reason: Resolve notes and manage repayment via controlled stock sales

Original SEC Filing: Helio Corp /FL/ [ HLEO ] - 8-K - May. 01, 2026

Disclaimer

data.title: HNO International Secures Up to $30 Million Equity Purchase Facility With Lambda Ventures
data.description:
HNO International entered two related financing agreements with Lambda Ventures to bolster liquidity. The company secured an Equity Purchase Agreement providing up to $30 million over 24 months, with puts between $25,000 and the lesser of $500,000 or 200% of Average Daily Trading Value, priced at a 20% discount to the lowest traded price during specified periods. HNO will issue 500,000 initial commitment shares and additional shares upon each $2.5 million funding milestone, and cover $10,000 of investor counsel fees. A companion Registration Rights Agreement requires HNO to file within 30 days and secure effectiveness within 90 days for the resale of all shares issued under the facility, supporting execution of the financing program.

Agreement 1: HNO International Secures Up to $30 Million Equity Purchase Facility With Lambda Ventures

  • Agreement type: Equity Purchase Agreement for up to $30 million equity line
  • Counterparty: Lambda Ventures
  • Signed / Effective: Apr 27 2026 / same
  • Duration / Termination: 24 months
  • Reason: Enhance liquidity and financial flexibility

Agreement 2: HNO International Signs Registration Rights Pact to Register Shares Issued Under $30M Facility

  • Agreement type: Registration Rights Agreement for resale of shares under equity line
  • Counterparty: Lambda Ventures
  • Signed / Effective: Apr 27 2026 / same
  • Reason: Enable resale registration to support financing program

Original SEC Filing: HNO International, Inc. [ HNOI ] - 8-K - May. 01, 2026

Disclaimer

data.description:

The warrants are immediately exercisable at $0.0001 per share with no expiration and include beneficial ownership caps of 4.99% (or up to 9.99% at the investor’s election). The purchase price was $0.9999 per warrant, and the company plans to use proceeds for general working capital. The securities were issued under Section 4(a)(2) and Rule 506(b) of Regulation D.

data.title: Biotricity Creates Series C, Swaps Into 1.96M Shares; Converts to 59.6% After $15M Raise
data.description:
Biotricity entered into exchange agreements with certain holders to swap 14.1 million common shares plus options and warrants into 1,957,297 shares of newly created Series C Preferred Stock at a 10-for-1 ratio. Each Series C share carries 40 votes and will automatically convert into 59.6% of Biotricity's outstanding common stock upon a qualified equity financing of at least $15 million, with matching warrant coverage if issued in that financing. If no qualified financing occurs by March 31, 2028, each Series C share is convertible into 10 common shares. The move is intended to streamline the capital structure and align stakeholders ahead of potential financing.

Agreement details:

  • Agreement type: Exchange agreements and Certificate of Designation for Series C Preferred Stock
  • Counterparty: Exchange Holders
  • Signed / Effective: May 01 2026 / May 01 2026
  • Duration / Termination: At will
  • Reason: Strengthen capital structure ahead of potential financing

Original SEC Filing: BIOTRICITY INC. [ BTCY ] - 8-K - May. 01, 2026

Disclaimer

data.title: GameStop preparing offer for eBay, WSJ reports
data.description:
GameStop is preparing to make an offer for eBAY , the Wall Street Journal reported on Friday, citing people familiar with the matter.

Shares of eBay, which has a market capitalization of about $46 billion, were up about 9% in extended trading on Friday.

Shares of GameStop, which has a market capitalization of nearly $12 billion, were up about 3%.

GameStop has been quietly building a stake in eBay's shares ahead of a potential offer, the report said. It could submit an offer for eBay as soon as later this month.

GameStop and eBay did not immediately respond to Reuters' requests for comment.
